name: Solink Video Security and Analytics API
what_it_does: Solink cloud video security and analytics REST API for retail loss prevention, POS transaction correlation, and multi-location video intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage POS transaction-to-video correlation for loss prevention investigation automation, handle exception-based reporting and transaction anomaly detection for retail shrink reduction, access multi-site video search and clip retrieval for security investigation workflow, retrieve customer traffic analytics and heat mapping for retail operations intelligence, manage alarm event correlation with video for security response automation, handle employee performance monitoring through video analytics for retail operations, access drive-through speed-of-service analytics for quick-service restaurant operations, retrieve safety incident documentation and video evidence management for risk management, manage remote video audit and compliance checking for franchise quality control, and integrate Solink with POS systems, alarm platforms, and retail analytics tools.
use_cases: Correlating POS transactions with video from loss prevention agents
Investigating shrink from exception reporting agents
Monitoring drive-through times from QSR operations agents
Auditing store compliance from remote video agents
not_for: Residential security without commercial retail context
Industrial surveillance without POS or transaction correlation
Non-retail video analytics without loss prevention focus
best_when: A multi-location retailer, restaurant chain, or franchise operator wanting AI agents to automate loss prevention investigation, POS exception correlation, video evidence retrieval, and remote store compliance auditing.
avoid_when: EMPLOYEE SURVEILLANCE PRIVACY LAWS: Automated video monitoring of employees in jurisdictions with employee monitoring consent requirements (California, Connecticut, Delaware, etc.) must provide notice; automated surveillance analytics without employee notice creates state employee privacy law violation. BIOMETRIC SURVEILLANCE RISK: Automated facial recognition or biometric identification in Solink video analytics creates BIPA (Illinois), CIPA, and other state biometric privacy law exposure; verify Solink analytics capabilities and jurisdictional compliance before deployment. GDPR video surveillance — automated video retention and analytics in EU locations must comply with GDPR data minimization, retention limits, and DPIA requirements; EU retail surveillance without compliant privacy notice and retention policy creates GDPR liability. False loss prevention accusation — automated transaction anomaly detection triggering customer confrontation based solely on AI pattern matching creates false accusation liability; always require human review before customer-facing loss prevention action.

auth.notes: Solink uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Ottawa, Ontario HQ. Founded 2012. Private (BDC Capital, Inovia Capital). Cloud video security and analytics for retail and QSR. 3,000+ location customers. POS-to-video correlation specialty. Competes with Envysion, Verkada, and March Networks for retail video security.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly/annual subscription; camera count and analytics modules
pricing.notes: Ottawa, Ontario. BDC/Inovia-backed. Founded 2012. 3,000+ locations. Retail and QSR video security. POS correlation specialty.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; video clip retrieval has bandwidth SLA

known_agent_gotchas: EMPLOYEE SURVEILLANCE CONSENT: Automated video analytics of employee behavior requires written notice in employee monitoring consent states (CA, CT, DE, NY, etc.); automated surveillance without notice creates state labor law violation — audit jurisdictional requirements before deployment

BIPA BIOMETRIC RISK: If Solink analytics include facial recognition or biometric identification features, automated use in Illinois, Texas, Washington, and other biometric privacy states creates BIPA/biometric privacy law violation; verify analytics capabilities and jurisdiction before enabling

False accusation liability — automated loss prevention alerts from POS exception + video correlation must require human review before customer or employee confrontation; AI-only anomaly detection is insufficient basis for accusation
GDPR video retention — EU locations must configure video retention periods compliant with GDPR data minimization; automated unlimited retention creates GDPR liability
Video clip bandwidth — automated bulk video clip retrieval for investigation workflows requires significant bandwidth; implement rate limiting and prioritization for bulk video processing

POS integration latency — POS-to-video correlation depends on POS timestamp accuracy; time sync issues between POS and camera systems create correlation mismatch — verify time synchronization before deploying automated investigation workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Video security and analytics. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/CA. Video surveillance and POS data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Video security. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/CA. Surveillance and retail analytics data.
